inputs.label: Gross Rental Income
inputs.businessContext: Total rental income from property before any expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total rental income from property before any expenses.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Mieteinnahmen aus der Immobilie vor Abzug aller Ausgaben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu locatif total de la propriété avant toute dépense.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso total por alquiler de la propiedad antes de cualquier gasto.

inputs.label: Vacancy Loss
inputs.businessContext: Income lost due to vacant units or non-payment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Income lost due to vacant units or non-payment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Boş birimler veya ödeme yapılmaması nedeniyle kaybedilen gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einkommensverlust durch leerstehende Einheiten oder Zahlungsausfälle.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu perdu en raison de logements vacants ou de non-paiement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso perdido debido a unidades desocupadas o falta de pago.

inputs.label: Property Management Fees
inputs.businessContext: Fees paid to property management company.

label_i18n.es: Gastos de administración de la propiedad

businessContext_i18n.en: Fees paid to property management company.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gebühren, die an die Hausverwaltung gezahlt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais payés à la société de gestion immobilière.
businessContext_i18n.es: Honorarios pagados a la empresa administradora de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Repairs & Maintenance
inputs.businessContext: Costs for routine repairs and maintenance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Costs for routine repairs and maintenance.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten für routinemäßige Reparaturen und Instandhaltung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts des réparations et de l'entretien courants.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos de reparaciones y mantenimiento rutinarios.
Gasto anual de impuestos sobre la propiedad.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Prime d'assurance annuelle de la propriété.
businessContext_i18n.es: Prima anual del seguro de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Utilities
inputs.businessContext: Utility costs not paid by tenants.

businessContext_i18n.en: Utility costs not paid by tenants.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kiracılar tarafından ödenmeyen kamu hizmeti maliyetleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebskosten, die nicht von Mietern getragen werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts des services publics non payés par les locataires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos de servicios públicos no pagados por los inquilinos.

formulas.totalOperatingExpenses: propertyManagementFees + repairsMaintenance + propertyTaxes + insurance + utilities + otherOperatingExpenses

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
